case_title: KHALIL N GHANAYEM VS. FELICIA JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF KHALIL N. GHANAYEM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELICIA JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-09-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KHALIL GHANAYEM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELICIA JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS UNDER THE IMPRESSION THAT HIS EXHIBITS IN APPEALED CASE CSM 19-859991 WOULD BE ATTACHED TO THIS CASE. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II SIGNED AN ORDER RELEASING THE EXHIBITS IN CASE CSM 19-859991 TO BE REVIEWED IN THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM CASE 19-859991. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY GHANAYEM, KHALIL N JOHNSON, FELICIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY GHANAYEM, KHALIL N AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, FELICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHANAYEM, KHALIL N IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, FELICIA PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE RESOLVED HIS INVOICE CLAIM IN THE EARLIER CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.
